data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the requirement of clearing balance and history on each redemption, but the provided evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that demonstrate this functionality. The existing evidence focuses on booking and payment processes but lacks any reference to balance clearing or history management upon redemption, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, the evidence does not address the requirement directly, leading to the conclusion that it is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of balance clearing and history management on redemption.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the balance clearing and history management requirement.
